name: Order Management
description: Customer-facing order history and tracking. Lists past orders with status, and provides detailed order views with delivery timeline.

page_briefs.orders: Data table listing past orders with order number, date, item count, total amount, status badge (processing, shipped, delivered, returned), and a view-detail link. Sortable by date and filterable by status.
page_briefs.order-detail: Detail header with order number, date, status badge, and total. Below, a vertical delivery timeline showing each status change with timestamp, location, and description. Line items table and payment summary at bottom.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar with account navigation and main content area
